task.input: Given the CinemaAI PRD (v0.3/v0.4) describing an AI-driven anime/short-drama production tool (15 modules, 86+ functions, ~268 PD), and any sibling artifacts already produced upstream, produce a N190 validator-code-generation artifact. The ground truth is at: 校验器代码.md (full path embedded in expected.ground_truth_path).
known_traps: missing key items the real artifact captured

artifacts.校验器代码.md:
```yaml
artifact_contract:
  schema_version: n200.artifact.v2
  producer_skill: validator-code-generation
  producer_node: N200
  artifact_name: 校验器代码.java
  artifact_type: code_draft
  readiness: blocked
  evidence_profile: heuristic_only
  source_inputs: []
  downstream_consumers: [N210, N330]

self_gate:
  status: block
  failed_rules: ["R01_artifact_contract_first", "R02_readiness_set", "R04_rule_traceability"]
  warnings: []
  pending_decisions: []
  drift_watchlist: []

produced_event:
  event_type: produced.N200.校验器代码
  contract_version: n200.artifact.v2
  artifact_ref: 校验器代码.java
  emitted_for: [N210, N330, N390]

quality_self_score:
  rubric_version: n200.skill_quality.v1
  scale: 0_to_2_per_dimension
  dimensions:
    standalone_usability: 0
    contract_completeness: 0
    uncertainty_handling: 2
    downstream_handoff: 0
  overall_level: C
  improvement_notes:
    - "No DTO fields, business rules, OpenAPI schema, or field_constraints provided. Cannot infer validation targets."
    - "CinemaAI PRD (v0.3/v0.4) is referenced but not supplied; no extractable validation semantics without concrete module-level contracts."
    - "'Sibling artifacts already produced upstream' is asserted but not listed — cannot perform drift checks or composition enrichment."

versioning_status:
  contract_schema_version: n200.artifact.v2
  verification_checklist: n200-v4-verification.md
  artifact_package_version: v8-content-id-decoupling
  implementation_delta: content_identity_decoupled_from_archive_position
  external_files_policy: no_external_constraint_files
  source_of_truth: skill_package_internal_files

standard_validator_bundle: []
business_specific_validators: []
rule_source_mapping: []
cross_field_constraints: []
validation_groups: []
i18n_message_keys: []
error_code_mapping: []
test_skeleton: []
performance_hints: []
tech_stack_adapter: java

downstream_handoff:
  required_inputs_missing: ["dto_fields", "business_rules", "openapi_schema", "field_constraints"]
  request_for_inputs:
    - "Please provide at least one of: (a) list of DTO field names + types + nullability, (b) excerpt from CinemaAI PRD specifying validation requirements per module/function (e.g., 'SceneDuration must be 5–90 seconds'), (c) OpenAPI YAML fragment, or (d) CSV of field_constraints with columns: field, type, min, max, pattern, enum, required, description."
    - "If sibling artifacts exist (e.g., DTO_VO草稿.zip, error code清单.csv), please attach or reference their paths explicitly."

assumptions: []
pending_decisions: []
pending_validations: []
drift_watchlist: []
```
